title: Meaningful Design Group
tagline: Designing regenerative futures from Bali, Indonesia.
description: MDG is a design research and make company based in Bali, pioneering regenerative design, digital fabrication, and community innovation across Southeast Asia.
copyright: © 2022–2026 Meaningful Design Group. All rights reserved. Bali, Indonesia.

philosophy.title: Palemahan
philosophy.subtitle: Harmony with Nature
philosophy.text: Every project begins with the land — designing with ecosystems, not against them.

philosophy.title: Pawongan
philosophy.subtitle: Harmony with People
philosophy.text: Technology and culture are inseparable. We build with communities, not for them.

philosophy.title: Parahyangan
philosophy.subtitle: Harmony with Spirit
philosophy.text: Purpose-driven making. Every object, system, and space should carry meaning.

founders.name: Tomas Diez
founders.bio: Urbanist, fab city pioneer, and design educator. Co-founder of the Fab City Summit and global advocate for distributed manufacturing.

founders.name: Agung Prianta
founders.bio: Balinese architect and cultural practitioner bridging traditional craftsmanship with digital fabrication.
